gsm.safety 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • AE Explorer report example

AE Explorer report example

Source: vignettes/ae-explorer-example.Rmd
ae-explorer-example.Rmd

This article shows the first gsm.safety AE Explorer report artifact. The report is intentionally static for now: it validates mapped AE inputs and summarizes adverse events by preferred term and body system. The workflow shape matches the workr report pattern used by GSM packages.

lSpec <- list(
  Mapped_SUBJ = list(subjid = list(type = "character")),
  Mapped_AE = list(
    subjid = list(type = "character"),
    mdrpt_nsv = list(type = "character"),
    mdrsoc_nsv = list(type = "character")
  )
)

lData <- gsm.safety::MakeAeExplorerExampleData()
lSettings <- gsm.safety::MakeAeExplorerSettings(lSpec)
lManifest <- gsm.safety::MakeAeExplorerManifest(
  lData = lData,
  lSettings = lSettings,
  lMeta = list(Type = "Report", ID = "ae_explorer", Output = "html")
)

lReport <- gsm.safety::Report_AE_Explorer(
  lData = lData,
  lSettings = lSettings,
  lManifest = lManifest,
  strOutputDir = tempdir(),
  strOutputFile = "ae_explorer_example"
)

lReport$path
#> [1] "/tmp/RtmpaXNlvM/ae_explorer_example.html"

The generated HTML report is embedded below as a pkgdown example preview.

<!doctype html> ae_explorer

ae_explorer

This static AE Explorer example validates mapped AE inputs and summarizes adverse events by preferred term and body system.

Overview

Subjects: 6
Subjects with AEs: 5
AE records: 6

Preferred terms

Preferred term AE records
Headache 2
Nausea 2
Dizziness 1
Fatigue 1

Body systems

Body system AE records
Nervous system disorders 3
Gastrointestinal disorders 2
General disorders 1

Known mapping gaps

  • treatment_col: No clear treatment/group field identified in current Mapped_SUBJ.
  • aeout: No current Mapped_AE outcome field identified.

Developed by obot.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
